curation_notes: Primary location derived from the advisory description which explicitly names serde.py and the deserialize_value function containing the unsafe pickle.loads call. Secondary location derived from the patch diff which modifies app.py's api_endpoint function to reject the pickle content type on the main server. Only 1 source file was changed in the patch. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed from CWE-502 and the patch which blocks pickle deserialization of untrusted HTTP request data.
